Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration Upon Plaintiff Ezra Curry And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Dec-09-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SKIP TRANSPORT, INC DBA SKIP Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration Upon Plaintiff Ezra Curry And Stay Proceedings

Defendant's motion to compel arbitration and stay the proceedings is granted. (see Word minutes for complete details) Order is signed. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
